ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on March 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why an inventory and a petition for final distribution have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
